description: You are a Software QA Analyst. The inventory management library at /home/ga/workspace/inventory_system/ has a test suite in the tests/ directory that is giving false positives. The library code in inventory/ is completely correct and MUST NOT be modified. Fix all 6 test files in the tests/ directory (test_stock_operations.py, test_pricing.py, test_alerts.py, test_transfers.py, test_reports.py, and test_concurrent_access.py) so that they genuinely validate the library's behavior and provide reliable test coverage.

metadata.occupation: Software Quality Assurance Analyst and Tester
